data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Sensitive data is encrypted both in-transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhanced user authentication to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Two-factor authentication using SMS and authenticator apps.

data.title: Threat Intelligence
data.description: Continuous threat monitoring to identify and mitigate risks.
data.technical_spec: Integration with security information and event management (SIEM) systems.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security checks to identify potential vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Use of automated vulnerability scanning tools and penetration testing.

data.title: Incident Response Plan
data.description: A structured approach to respond to and manage cybersecurity incidents.
data.technical_spec: Detailed incident response processes and regular drills.
